data.description:
## Why

The reusable 4-pass review pipeline needs criteria that are conditionally INCLUDED based on the
input (a security criterion fires only on security triggers; intent-fidelity only when a session
log is linked; container criteria only for parents with children). Conditional step inclusion is
declarative in every engine that has it (Argo `when:`, dbt `config(enabled=…)`, Step Functions
`Choice`), so the engine should express it declaratively rather than via scripts.

## What

Add a `when`/`enabled` predicate to the prompt step (and document it as the overlay mechanism).
The predicate is evaluated over RECORDED inputs available at run start (ticket material, has-linked-
session-log, has-children, etc.). The interpreter resolves the included-set ONCE and JOURNALS it as
a run-start event; on replay the resolved set is READ from the record, never recomputed (so a
mid-run store edit cannot change the included-set). Excluded steps are recorded as skipped.

## Scope

- src/rebar/llm/workflow/schema.py + the packaged JSON Schema: the `when`/`enabled` field + validation.
- src/rebar/llm/workflow/interpreter.py: predicate evaluation over recorded inputs; resolve-once +
  journal the resolved included-set at run-start; skip excluded steps (recorded).
- Dry-render support (render shows which steps are conditionally included).
- A predicate language that is small, total, and deterministic (no arbitrary code; no live LLM).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] A prompt step accepts a `when`/`enabled` predicate; it parses + schema-validates; an invalid
      predicate is a validation error (not a runtime surprise).
- [ ] The interpreter resolves the included-set over recorded inputs and JOURNALS it at run-start;
      excluded steps are recorded as skipped.
- [ ] REPLAY test: after resolution, mutating the underlying store does NOT change the resolved
      included-set on replay (the set is read from the journaled record).
- [ ] The predicate language is total/deterministic (no arbitrary code execution, no network/LLM).
- [ ] make lint + the workflow test suite pass.
data.title: Overlay construct: a declarative when/enabled predicate on prompt steps (resolved set journaled at run-start)
